nodes.label: Mock vs OpenBB Data Provider Duality
nodes.norm_label: mock vs openbb data provider duality

nodes.label: Dual Provider Pattern (mock vs OpenBB)
nodes.rationale: Mock providers (mock_prices.py, mock_fx_rates.py, mock_screener.py) are used for fast deterministic tests; OpenBB providers (openbb_prices.py, openbb_fx_rates.py, openbb_screener.py) used for live data via yfinance (free) or FMP (paid). Same interface — swap by changing the import.

nodes.label: Diff-Based Equal-Weight Rebalancing
nodes.rationale: Computes total portfolio value, divides equally among target tickers, generates only the minimal buy/sell transactions needed (diff against current positions). Empty target list causes all positions to be sold.

nodes.label: Procedural Architecture — One File Per Action
nodes.rationale: Each action is a separate file in actions/. BacktestContext holds state and delegates to action functions. This makes actions independently testable and swappable without touching the context.
nodes.norm_label: procedural architecture — one file per action

nodes.label: Decimal for Financial Precision
nodes.rationale: All financial values use Python Decimal to avoid floating-point precision errors common in stock price and FX rate calculations.
